titles.title: ELEVATE Act of 2026
ELEVATE Act of 2026
Encouraging Local Emerging Ventures and Economic Growth Act of 2026

A bill to amend the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 to specify certain registration statement contents for emerging growth companies, to permit issuers to file draft registration statements with the Securities and Exchange Commission for confidential review, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.

committee.name: Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs
